rulings.Case Title: LIANG, JOSEPH (AKA) KIAN JOE LIANG VS. THIAT JOE LIANG et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 26, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANTS THIAT LIANG and SRI UTAN'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL BONTEKOE et al VS. JOHN ARMOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Relief From Inadvertent Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 26, 2014, Line 2: PLAINTIFFS PAUL BONTEKOE and JEFFREY SPAHN'S Motion For Relief From Inadvertent Dismissal. GRANTED in part. Voluntary dismissal is set aside. Request to reinstate/re-set trial date shall be made in Department 206. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 26, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS LARRY WEI and FONG CHIENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to September 26, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than September 5, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOMEOWNERS FIRST, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABIL VS. MARK A. MENDAROS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 26, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT MARK MENDAROS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVP 456 VALLEJO, LLC VS. DONALD DEREZINSKI
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 26, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT DONALD DEREZINSKI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. Notice contains confusing and inconsistent instructions regarding the cure required (removing the debris or allowing an inspection) and the time for such cure, i.e. 3 days from the date of service of until July 3, 2014 (5 days). =(501/REQ)
